shortDescription: "The base case of a structural recursion consists of a recursive self-call"

In a traversal over a recursive structure,
the base case processes the terminal node using a recursive call.

frontmatter.shortDescription: The base case of a structural recursion consists of a recursive self-call
frontmatter.shortCorrection: The base case of a structural recursion does not perform a recursive call
